next_steps: Genetic testing for TTR gene mutation
Cardiac MRI with T1 mapping and extracellular volume quantification
Endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive workup is nondiagnostic
Quantitative serum free light-chain assay and serum/urine immunofixation electrophoresis
Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scintigraphy for cardiac amyloidosis
Transthyretin (TTR) gene sequencing to rule out hereditary ATTR
Echocardiography with strain analysis (apical sparing pattern)
Endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive markers are nondiagnostic
